creator: stas@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tue,  8 Dec 2009 04:02:30 +0300 (MSK)
 Dmitry Marakasov <amdmi3@amdmi3.ru> mentioned:
 
 > The port doesn't build due to checksum mismatch.
 > 
 > distinfo:
 > MD5 (ufraw-0.16.tar.gz) = 008acc06f13efad58e0edf2dca8c6afd
 > SHA256 (ufraw-0.16.tar.gz) = ed43432d04fbac1b084eed94486794c3dfb8fcd01fd9b02da066365d09687034
 > SIZE (ufraw-0.16.tar.gz) = 1072175
 > 
 > what actually fetches:
 > MD5 (ufraw-0.16.tar.gz) = 61e100e42f17e3a7fcfae64506eebd14
 > SHA256 (ufraw-0.16.tar.gz) = 36f1fe6adb012b34fe0351221e1a0a2c2e08ef05e8eb05ebeab16ccf4ff3df19
 > SIZE (ufraw-0.16.tar.gz) = 1075577
 > 
 
 Have you checked what actually happened to the original distfile?
 Were there any changes, or the tarball just was rerolled?
 
 -- 
 Stanislav Sedov
 ST4096-RIPE
